_comment_provider: opencode zen is the default; OPENCODE_API_KEY is read from the agent container env.
_comment_mcp: Every MCP server is wrapped in `pipelock mcp proxy` so server responses are scanned for prompt injection before reaching the model. The pipelock binary must be on PATH inside the agent container — see the install step in docker-compose.yaml. Add more servers below following the same pattern.
_comment_tools: Disable opencode's built-in webfetch — the agent should fetch through pipelock's /fetch endpoint instead, which runs DLP + injection scanning. The model will be told how to use it via AGENTS.md.
_comment_share: Disable session sharing so transcripts never leave the box.
